text: Use Claude for Excel | Claude Help Center Use Claude for Excel Claude for Excel is available to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. Claude for Excel is an add-in that integrates Claude into your Excel workflow. It's designed for professionals who work extensively with spreadsheets, particularly in financial analysis and modeling. With Claude for Excel, you can: Ask questions about your workbook and get answers with cell-level citations Ask questions about your workbook and get answers with cell-level citations Update assumptions while preserving formula dependencies Update assumptions while preserving formula dependencies Debug errors and identify their root causes Debug errors and identify their root causes Build new models or fill existing templates Build new models or fill existing templates Navigate complex multi-tab workbooks seamlessly Navigate complex multi-tab workbooks seamlessly Use connectors to bring context from your other tools directly into your spreadsheets Use connectors to bring context from your other tools directly into your spreadsheets Get started with Claude for Excel Supported versions Excel on the web Excel on the web Excel on Windows (Microsoft 365 subscription, build 16.0.13127.20296+) Excel on Windows (Microsoft 365 subscription, build 16.0.13127.20296+) Excel on Mac (version 16.46+, build 21011600+) Excel on Mac (version 16.46+, build 21011600+) Excel on iPad (version 2.51+) Excel on iPad (version 2.51+) For individuals Navigate to the Claude for Excel listing on Microsoft Marketplace . Navigate to the Claude for Excel listing on Microsoft Marketplace . Click "Get it now" to install the add-in. Click "Get it now" to install the add-in. Open Excel, activate the add-in, and sign in with your Claude account. Open Excel, activate the add-in, and sign in with your Claude account. For admins Deploy Claude for Excel to your organization: Visit the Microsoft 365 Admin Center . Visit the Microsoft 365 Admin Center . Navigate to Settings > Org Settings > User owned apps and services and ensure that “Let users access the Office Store" is toggled on. Navigate to Settings > Org Settings > User owned apps and services and ensure that “Let users access the Office Store" is toggled on. Navigate to Settings > Integrated apps > Add-ins . Navigate to Settings > Integrated apps > Add-ins . Search for "Claude by Anthropic for Excel" in Microsoft AppSource. Search for "Claude by Anthropic for Excel" in Microsoft AppSource. Deploy the add-in to your organization or specific users. Deploy the add-in to your organization
